name: @rawsql-ts/shared-binder
description: Shared named-parameter binder utilities for rawsql-ts packages.
author: msugiura

scripts.release: npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build && node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('../../../tmp', { recursive: true })" && pnpm pack --out ../../../tmp/rawsql-ts-shared-binder.tgz && pnpm publish --access public
